slides.objective: Hook SME owners: run the business, let AI run the busywork
Quantify the cost of admin so the problem feels real
Internalize the four shifts from tools to workflows
slides.rationale: 4 short parallel principles -> reveal one at a time

slides.objective: Learn the four stages of an AI workflow: Capture -> Draft -> Review -> Send
slides.rationale: a staged process with discrete parts -> explore each stage

slides.objective: See the categories of work where AI fits across the week
slides.rationale: self-selectable categories of business function -> accordion

slides.objective: Decide which automation to build first and see the consequence
slides.rationale: a choice with consequences -> branching scenario

slides.objective: Estimate the personal payback of automating one task
Confirm the key takeaway: build the workflow before the automation
Leave the viewer with one concrete next step
slides.rationale: a closing CTA sets resolve — never interactive
